---
title: "KnowledgeableLMs Workshop @ ACL 2024 — CFP"
description: "KnowledgeableLMs workshop at ACL 2024 — long and short paper submissions on knowledge in LMs, RAG, knowledge editing, hallucinations. Deadline May 20."
author: "synesis"
date: "2024-02-27"
categories: [NLP, LLMs, knowledge graphs, RAG, research, conference, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Towards Knowledgeable Foundation Models. Image from [KnowledgeableLMs Workshop](https://knowledgeable-lm.github.io/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Knowledgeable LMs workshop @ ACL 2024 is open for submissions: deadline May 20.

"We welcome long (8 page) and short (4 page) paper submissions on all topics related to knowledgable LMs, including:

Analysis of knowledge within LMs: how much they know and where that knowledge is from. Enhancing LMs with existing knowledge sources (knowledge graphs, domain-specific databases, manuals, and rules, etc, either during training or inference). Analyzing and improving RAG (retrieval-augmented generation) systems Updating and editing knowledge in LMs. Knowledge extraction and generation using LMs Evaluation of knowledge utilization (faithfulness, truthfulness) by LMs. Identification and mitigation of LM hallucinations, factual error correction."


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_knowledgeablelms-acl-2024-activity-7168356822049902592-v1DS).*
